productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Black Pack of 2 Brief
description: The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.Pack of two black briefs A hot winter collection from undercolors of benetton, this V-cut brief is crafted from a quick dry soft 95% cotton and 5% elastane fabric. The V-cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the flock print label on the waistband offers abrasion-free comfort. Crafted from a 95% cotton and 5% elastane blend Broad and stretchable waistband in that sits snug and comfortably Flock print brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
